title: Hide player
description: ✘ Hides the player in the world and in the chat
body:
**The mod is made to order and is unlikely to be updated.**


This mod works on the client, it hides the player by nickname, it can hide in the world and in the chat.

For convenience, commands have been made to avoid getting into the config and not constantly restarting the game.
### commands:
_/Hall_ - Hides both in the chat and in the world.

_/Hchat_ - Hides only in chat.

_/Hworld_ - Hides only in the world.

_/Hdel_ - Removes hiding.

**Example:**
/Hall Nickname or /Hdel Nickname


**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**
